message:

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "ollama-3697-no-llama-cpp-acknowledgement",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "ollama: No llama.cpp acknowledgement ",
+    "description": "No llama.cpp acknowledgement . This issue affects 35+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Ollama setup",
+        "description": "Verify your Ollama version:\n```bash\nollama version\n```\nThis issue was about missing llama.cpp acknowledgement in the Ollama README."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the issue",
+        "description": "Ollama is heavily dependent on [llama.cpp](https://github.com/ggerganov/llama.cpp) for its LLM inference backend. The project was missing proper acknowledgement of this dependency in its README and documentation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Resolution",
+        "description": "The Ollama team added llama.cpp acknowledgement to the README. See the [commit](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/commit/9755cf9173152047030b6d080c29c829bb050a15) for the change.\n\nThis is a documentation-only fix that does not require any user action."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the fix",
+        "description": "The llama.cpp acknowledgement is now visible in the Ollama README on GitHub. No configuration changes are needed."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The Ollama team added proper llama.cpp acknowledgement to the project README.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
